fact_nuggets.text: Steelworker (Japanese: Steelworker) is an Ability introduced in Generation VII. It is the signature Ability of Dhelmise.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] If a Steel-type move is used by a Pokemon with this Ability, its Attack or Special Attack stat is multiplied by 1.5 during damage calculation, effectively increasing damage dealt by 50%. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Steelworker has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] If a Steel-type move is used by a Pokemon with this Ability, its Attack or Special Attack stat is multiplied by 1.5 during damage calculation, effectively increasing damage dealt by 50%.
This Pokemon's Steel moves have 1.5 power.
